firstContactOpener: It feels like this is the first time we're properly meeting — before we start, could you tell me a little about yourself? Like what I should call you, and what you're usually busy with?
fileStageFallback: Couldn't copy the file into the workspace.
historyLoadFailedTemp: Couldn't load chat history; this session will show as a temporary conversation for now.
modelUnavailableNamed: The current model "{{name}}" isn't available yet. Open Settings at the bottom left and fill in the Base URL, token, and model name.
modelNone: No model available yet. Open Settings at the bottom left and add a model configuration.
dropOnlyNote: (The user didn't type anything and only dropped the files above. Read them first, then act on them, or confirm what to do.)
sessionNoText: The model connected but returned no text. Please check whether it supports chat completions.
sessionSendFailed: Failed to send the Pi session prompt.
dropTitle: Let go to hand the files over
dropHint: They'll be copied into the workspace, then we can chat

input.messageAria: Type a message to the character
input.placeholderDisabled: Set up a model provider in system settings first…
input.placeholderAttachments: How should they handle these files? (You can also send with no text.)
input.placeholderDefault: Say something, or drag in a file for them to look at with you…

feed.title: Life circle
feed.subtitle: Little slices of everyone's day
feed.empty: No one has posted yet. When someone's in the mood, they'll leave a slice of life here.

letters.title: Keepsake box
letters.hintWriting: {{names}} is putting something together for you…
letters.hintIdle: As you chat, they'll quietly send you little things
letters.reactPlaceholder: Say something back… (optional — an emoji alone is fine)
letters.empty: The keepsake box is still empty. Chat with everyone a bit, and in time they'll quietly send you something.

default.label: Manual review
default.description: Risky actions (editing files, running commands, etc.) pause and wait for you to allow or cancel.

auto.label: Model review
auto.description: The model reviews each risky action and allows or rejects it automatically, without interrupting you.

all.label: Allow all
all.description: Skip all review; every action runs directly. Risky — use with caution.
